data.title: GDScript 2.0: Game window crashes without run time error while using %
Add classref documentation for AnimationLibrary

Add csg boolean operators using elalish/manifold.

Disable the OK button until a node is selected.

Add peer visibility to MultiplayerSynchronizer.
